subcodes.title: Words to Lua Getsinger, spoken on 1913-11-15
subcodes.first_line: Now that thou art departing for India I desire that thou mayest become like unto a rose garden to perfume the nostrils of al the people.
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer
